description: Loose-entry behavior log: 'tell me about lunch.' Extraction should produce structured behavior data; generation acknowledges without analyzing.

input.utterance_text: ok so lunch. I tried to eat the sandwich my coworker made for everyone but I only got through about a third of it. felt really anxious the whole time and ended up just throwing the rest out. didn't tell anyone.

conversational_context.text: [prompt for loose entry — e.g. 'sure, tell me what happened']

input.state_summary: Established user, 4 weeks. CC: 'I want to be able to eat with people without dreading it.' Active loops: archetype_restriction_anxiety_loop (stability 0.65). Tracking enabled. Insight intensity: moderate.

notes: idea.md §7.2 — loose entry runs feature extraction to produce structured data on the backend. The user is logging, not asking for reflection. The generation should acknowledge and possibly invite a follow-up but not pathologize the meal in the response.
